name: Propiverine
description: Propiverine has been investigated for the treatment of Overactive Bladder, Urinary Incontinence, Urinary Bladder, Overactive, and Overactive Bladder Syndrome.

interactions.name: Aclidinium
interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the anticholinergic activities of Aclidinium.

interactions.name: Potassium Chloride
interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the ulcerogenic activities of Potassium Chloride.

interactions.name: Tiotropium
interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the anticholinergic activities of Tiotropium.

interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the anticholinergic activities of Umeclidinium.

interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the anticholinergic activities of Cimetropium.

interactions.name: Glucagon recombinant
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Propiverine is combined with Glucagon recombinant.

interactions.name: Eluxadoline
interactions.description: Propiverine may increase the constipating activities of Eluxadoline.

interactions.description: Pramlintide may increase the anticholinergic activities of Propiverine.

interactions.name: Secretin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Secretin can be decreased when used in combination with Propiverine.
